title: CIET NCERT – SRF, JPF and More – 21 Posts
org: Senior Research Fellow/Senior Research Associate, Junior Project Fellow, 3D Graphic Developer/Animator/Graphic Designer
shortInfo: CIET NCERT has published the CIET Recruitment 2026 notification to fillup 21 SRF, JPF and More posts through CIET NCERT. Apply online by May 28. Salary ₹35,000-42,000. Check eligibility, age limit, syllabus, selection process, important dates, and apply online link here.

basic_details.organization_name: Central Institute of Educational Technology (CIET), NCERT, New Delhi
basic_details.post_name: Senior Research Fellow/Senior Research Associate, Junior Project Fellow, 3D Graphic Developer/Animator/Graphic Designer

qualification.education_qualification: Any Graduate, B.Des, Any Post Graduate

how_to_apply: Candidates must fill the online application form using the QR code provided for each post. Separate applications are required for different posts.
